title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Finolex Cables Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Finolex Cables Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Finolex Cables Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Navi Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Finolex Cables Holdings Services:
Finolex Cables Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Finolex Cables Holdings Services!
